category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

target_market_label.zh: 芬兰（SFS / 能源局 / 芬兰输电）
target_market_label.zht: 芬蘭（SFS / 能源局 / 芬蘭輸電）

title.en: China-to-Finland EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入芬兰：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入芬蘭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Finland (SFS / Energiavirasto / Fingrid) and EU CE framework expectations, including IEC 61851, IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2 compatibility, electrical protection-device requirements, cold-climate derating for Finnish winters (-30°C to -40°C), and national installation rules.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与芬兰（SFS / 能源局 / 芬兰输电）及欧盟CE框架要求对照，涵盖IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2兼容性、保护装置要求、芬兰冬季寒冷气候降额（−30°C至−40°C）和国家安装规则。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與芬蘭（SFS / 能源局 / 芬蘭輸電）及歐盟CE框架要求對照，涵蓋IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2相容性、保護裝置要求、芬蘭冬季寒冷氣候降額（−30°C至−40°C）和國家安裝規則。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, electrical-installation design, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and installers should verify current Finland (SFS / Energiavirasto / Fingrid / Tukes) and EU-CE requirements before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、电气安装设计、并网或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行芬兰（SFS / 能源局 / 芬兰输电 / Tukes）及欧盟CE相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計、併網或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行芬蘭（SFS / 能源局 / 芬蘭輸電 / Tukes）及歐盟CE相關要求。

answer_first.en: For Finland-bound EV chargers, the most critical gaps are Type 2/CCS2 connector alignment under IEC 62196, compatibility with AFIR obligations as implemented through member-state practice, CE conformity evidence under LVD/EMC/RED where in scope, RCD/RDC protection, cold-climate derating for Finnish winters (operating temperatures down to -30°C or -40°C must be verified), and Fingrid/Energiavirasto installation and grid-operator coordination. 230/400 V 50 Hz parameters are required for project readiness and Helsinki/Kotka are the primary entry ports. Finnish or Swedish language documentation may be expected.
answer_first.zh: 对于芬兰，关键差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2与CCS2接口一致性、成员国实施下AFIR义务、适用范围内的LVD/EMC/RED合规证据、RCD/RDC保护、芬兰冬季寒冷气候降额验证（需验证最低工作温度至−30°C或−40°C），以及芬兰输电/能源局并网/项目协调要求。须以230/400 V、50 Hz参数完成交付准备，赫尔辛基和科特卡为主要入境口岸。可能需要提供芬兰语或瑞典语文件。
answer_first.zht: 對於芬蘭，關鍵差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2與CCS2介面一致性、會員國實施下AFIR義務、適用範圍內的LVD/EMC/RED合規證據、RCD/RDC保護、芬蘭冬季寒冷氣候降額驗證（需驗證最低工作溫度至−30°C或−40°C），以及芬蘭輸電/能源局併網/專案協調要求。須以230/400 V、50 Hz參數完成交付準備，赫爾辛基和科特卡為主要入境口岸。可能需要提供芬蘭語或瑞典語文件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
